answer:
The first pass occurs 18.5 m from the deep end, meaning Ram (starting from deep end) has covered 18.5 m while Shyam has covered \(L - 18.5\) m.  
After turning and a 45-second rest, the second pass is 10.5 m from the shallow end, so from the deep end it is \(L - 10.5\) m.  
Using the ratio of distances covered in each segment and accounting for the rest time, solving gives \(L = 50\) m.

\boxed{D}
